title: Diş Protez Teknolojisi Programı - Ders İçeriği
content:
BİRİNCİ YARIYIL

2075G1001 ATATÜRK İLKELERİ VE INKILAP TARİHİ I (2-0-2/2)

2075G1002 TÜRK DİLİ I  (2-0-2/2)

Dersin içeriği ise Determiners - This, that, these, those Verb to be ( am / is / are ), Simple Present Tense – Have, has, Simple Present Tense – routine actions– permanent states– repeated actions and habits, adverbs of frequency– question forms such as Do you….. / How often do you …? konularından oluşmaktadır.

İKİNCİ YARIYIL

2075B1001 ATATÜRK İLKELERİ VE INKILAP TARİHİ II  (2-0-2/4)

2075B1002 TÜRK DİLİ II (2-0-2/2)

Bu dersin içeriğini, Adjectives; Comparative adjectives, Superlative adjectives, Verb patterns love, enjoy, hate…Past Continuous Tense – when, while–for something which Continued before and after another action–for something that Happened before and after a particular time, Past Simple vs Past Continuous, Been (when someone has gone to a place and returned) or Gone (when someone has not returned) Present Perfect vs Past Simple ve If clause Type  Zero : when talking about our habits, our typical behaviors, explanations, guidelines, advices, orders and instructions, general truths, Real World and scientific facts oluşturmaktadır.

1018B1005 HAREKETLİ PROTEZLER I (2-2-3/3)

PROGRAM SEÇMELİ DERS I

PROGRAM SEÇMELİ DERS II

10B1003       SAĞLIK TURİZMİ (2-0-2/4)
